identity: Human MAN (male), about 28 years old, messy wind-swept dark brown hair, dark brown eyes, intense focused adult expression, faint blue lightning arcing across the skin and hair.
outfit: Deep blue hooded cloak or jacket with gold-orange trim along the front seam, hood down.
weapons: No staff — conjures lightning with bare hands. Blue lightning bolts crackle around his fists and shoulders.
attackStyle: East-facing. Right hand thrust forward hurling a forked blue lightning bolt, left hand drawn back, cloak whipping in the wind.
spellStyle: East-facing. Both hands raised at shoulder height with arcs of blue lightning jumping between the palms, hair standing up from static.
blockStyle: East-facing. Arms crossed in front of the chest, a crackling dome of blue lightning around the body.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling, lightning extinguished, head bowed, cloak slumped.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), intense idle. Both hands at the sides, small blue sparks flickering at the fingertips, dark hair wind-blown.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Messy wind-swept dark brown hair, intense face, deep blue cloak with gold-orange trim, blue lightning arcing around the shoulders and collar.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human MAN (male), about 28 years old, messy wind-swept dark brown hair, dark brown eyes, intense focused adult expression, faint blue lightning arcing across the skin and hair.

OUTFIT: Deep blue hooded cloak or jacket with gold-orange trim along the front seam, hood down.

WEAPONS: No staff — conjures lightning with bare hands. Blue lightning bolts crackle around his fists and shoulders.

CLASS: humanoid. FULL-BODY reference — the entire figure from the crown of the head down to the soles of the feet must be fully visible inside the 256x256 canvas.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. Both feet visible and planted on the implied ground plane. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a waist-up crop, NOT a close-up.

FRAMING (non-negotiable): FULL-BODY shot head-to-toe. Entire figure fits inside the 256x256 canvas: feet fully visible with ~6-8% clearance above the bottom edge (NEVER cropped, NEVER cut off), head with ~6-8% headroom above the hair (NEVER cropped). Figure occupies ~85% of canvas height, centered. NOT a bust, NOT waist-up, NOT a three-quarter body crop. Camera pulled back for a full-body reference. Match cross-roster scale: same pixel height as every other adult humanoid in this sprite set.

AGE & PROPORTIONS (non-negotiable): character is a fully-grown adult about 28-32 years old with standard heroic adult proportions (approximately 6 feet / 180 cm tall in-world). NOT a child, NOT a teenager, NOT elderly, NOT a graybeard wizard.

BODY PROPORTIONS (non-negotiable): realistic adult human head-to-body ratio — the head is approximately 1/7 to 1/8 of the total body height. TALL and SLENDER with long adult legs (roughly half of total height), a full-length adult torso, and normal-sized adult shoulders. NOT chibi, NOT bobblehead, NOT big-head-small-body, NOT child-bodied, NOT stubby. The silhouette must read as a tall adult, never as a kid in adult clothes.

CROSS-ROSTER SCALE (non-negotiable, IDENTICAL for every humanoid): a standard adult human is 180 cm tall in-world and MUST render at the SAME relative pixel height as every other adult humanoid in this sprite set. Fighter, Knight, Paladin, Rogue, Cleric, Mage, etc all read at the same size — never one character much taller or much shorter than another of the same 180 cm baseline. The only permitted variance is small natural adult build differences (slender vs broad), never scale differences. Do not zoom in on smaller characters or zoom out on larger ones.

FRAMING & CANVAS USE (non-negotiable): full-body figure occupies ~85% of the 256x256 canvas height, centered horizontally. Feet rest ~6-8% above the bottom canvas edge (fully visible, NEVER cropped, NEVER touching the edge, NEVER cut off by the frame). Head has ~6-8% headroom above the hair (NEVER cropped). The head is ~12-13% of canvas height (~1/7.5 of body). This applies to south, east, east_attack, east_spell, east_block, east_ko — ALL action poses. Weapons may extend laterally but the character body (feet-to-head) must remain inside the canvas with clearance. Portrait is the ONLY exception and uses a bust-shot crop.

LIGHTING (non-negotiable): bright evenly-lit pixel art, NOT silhouetted, NOT overly dark, NOT cast in deep shadow. All colors, facial features, and outfit details must be fully readable.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow, no cropping of any body part at the canvas edge.
